scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && node scripts/consolidate-build.js
scripts.postbuild:server: cd build/server && npm install --omit=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --skip-generate --accept-data-loss
scripts.deploy:hostinger: npm run build && npm run postbuild:server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
